title: paspalum aegyptiacum
intro: Paspalum aegyptiacum, also known as Nile grass or Egyptian grass, is a type of tropical grass native to Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum aegyptiacum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
